text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Even after her debut race, Agnes Tachyon
continues to prioritize her research over racing.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
My experimentation has reached a standstill, you
see. I must return to the lab at once.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: With that said, I will take my leave.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, judging by the level of competency she
showed on the track, there's no doubting her rare
talent.
choice_data_list: (She has what it takes to reach the top!)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It hasn't been that long since her debut, but I
believe setting the Classic Triple Crown as a goal
won't be a problem.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We'll enter the Satsuki Sho in April, the Japanese
Derby in May, and the Kikuka Sho in October...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Before the end of the day, I've already laid out
her race agenda for the next three years.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The next day, as I go looking for Agnes Tachyon
with the completed agenda in hand...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
For the last time, I will not participate in your
experiments...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Now now, don't say that! Aren't we friends?

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: ...Since when did we become friends?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
What do you mean? As two fellow outcasts, there
is an intrinsic understanding between us. Well,
not really, but...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
I thought we might at least have a mutual
understanding?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: In the empty classroom is Manhattan Cafe...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's an unusual Umamusume, said to have
enrolled in the academy in order to follow after
her "invisible friend."

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And sliding up to her like a snake is Agnes
Tachyon.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Oh, if it isn't Trainer! Sorry, but I'm in the middle
of something right now.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: No, you're okay. I was just about to leave...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Ah! She got away! I was so close, too!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Well... it's nothing to cry about. Tell me, what is
the matter, Trainer?
choice_data_list: I have something important to tell you!
I have something important to tell you!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Something important, you say. I'm willing to
listen, but keep it short.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Wait, I take that back. Tell me all the details. But
before that...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Are you okay?! You're so out of breath! This is
urgent. Quick! Have some water and regain your
composure!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her sudden burst of frantic energy raises
suspicion, but I still take a gulp from the water
bottle she hands me.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I then start to explain the race agenda in detail.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... Setting our eyes on the Satsuki Sho, the
Japanese Derby, and the Kikuka Sho...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
That means our first goal is the Yayoi Sho. I
see...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
And to go for the Classic Triple Crown! A rather
bold proposition.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While she did listen intently, I can't shake the
feeling that her response lacks enthusiasm.
choice_data_list: I know you're capable of doing it!
I know you're capable of doing it!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Heh, you're free to selfishly pin your hopes on
me. I wouldn't deny you that.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
The agenda matches the future you've
envisioned, for certain.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
I don't mind the goals you've set. However, I
cannot promise that I will participate in every
single race.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
In the end, I will be the one to make that
decision.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
My utmost priority is my research, after all! I can't
be spending time on secondary concerns.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: By the way, how are you feeling right now?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
You may not know it, but your hair has turned a
watery blue.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
My attention now fixated on my new aqua-blue
hairdo, I forget about the agenda for the rest of
the day.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Later on, her eccentricity comes into play again...

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
That person over there has been loitering around
since morning. What do you think they're doing?

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text: I dunno... maybe they're someone's trainer?

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: ...They're here today, too.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text: What the heck... Talk about creepy.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Once again, Agnes Tachyon doesn't show up to
training.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I was expecting great things when I scouted her,
but now...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
To begin with, she didn't exactly show an
abundance of enthusiasm for the Twinkle Series.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Did she run her debut only to gather data for her
research on speed?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The sun will start setting soon. The stares of the
other Umamusume are bringing me down too. I let
out a sigh and turn to leave.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Hey! Wait, guinea pig! Don't give in! I'm coming
to run today!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
I finally finished my latest sample! I want to try it
immediately!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: You have a timer, don't you? Get it ready for me!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In that exact moment, she takes off. By instinct, I
start my stopwatch.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Huff... puff!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: ...Hahahaha! Fear not! I can go faster! Faster!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She single-mindedly dashes across the dirt, but in
that frantic sprint, I spy something for an instant.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I can see the same runner I scouted back then.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
The latent potential within an Umamusume's legs!
The limits of this body's speed!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
I've yet to see even a glimpse of either, for I know
that they lie beyond the horizon!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I watch with bated breath as she sprints under the
evening sky.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Sigh...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: She's made a record time for each section.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I look toward her direction...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And see that she's copiously spraying her legs
with some substance.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Pssshhh...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Heh-heh-heh! Not bad, if I must say! In fact, it's of
excellent quality!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Developing an aerosol was so worth the while!
The prototype is now complete! This is an
auspicious sign of things to come!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Don't tell me you don't know what a cold spray is.
Aren't you supposed to be a trainer?
choice_data_list: What's the reason for the cold spray?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
The same reason one ingests protein and calcium
if one wishes to become taller.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
That aside, I made this in preparation for next
year. So show some excitement.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
What do you mean? I'm talking about our plans
for the Classics.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I guess I was completely wrong about her being
uninterested.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Although... In reality, who knows how things will
turn out?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Still, still, I haven't refused any of your
propositions, I just can't make any promises.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In the days that follow, I become subject to her
whim, with her sometimes showing up to training
and sometimes not.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Even so, it seems I've managed to establish the
Classics as our shared goal.
